name: Source Fidelity Review for Non-LLM CR Augmentation Update
summary: The four included sources are represented with bounded access metadata. Lun, Krisnawati, and Li/Haudek/Krajcik are full-text extractions with source locators matching the staged claims; Bonthu is correctly limited to official abstract/search-indexed publisher text with lower confidence and follow-up actions. No source-fidelity issue blocks publication.

findings.claim_or_issue: Bonthu et al. is included from official abstract/search-indexed ScienceDirect text rather than full-text extraction.
findings.why_it_matters: The source can support a bounded existence claim for ASAG text augmentation, but exact sample sizes, split design, and table-level metrics should not be synthesized until full text is retrieved.
findings.recommended_action: Retrieve full text before using Bonthu et al. for detailed method comparison or quantitative synthesis.

findings.claim_or_issue: Initial search shorthand misidentified the scientific-model paper as He et al.; Crossref and Springer metadata show Tingting Li, Kevin Haudek, and Joseph Krajcik.
findings.why_it_matters: Correct authorship is necessary for citation fidelity.
findings.recommended_action: Use Li, Haudek, and Krajcik in all source, finding, and synthesis text.
